prompt: I want to add a digital waiver system. Customers should be able to sign a waiver on their phone before they can use the range. Right now we just have paper waivers and it's a mess.

assertions.text: Output references specific rangeops files or patterns (schema files, existing models, routes)
No functional requirements slip through (no approval workflows, field-level rules, permission models, specific validation logic, or data schema designs)
All 6 domains covered: problem/motivation, stakeholders/impact, feasibility, high-level scope, risks/assumptions, recommendation

Scope doc has these sections: Problem Statement, Stakeholders, Feasibility Assessment, High-Level Scope (with in/out/investigate), Key Risks & Assumptions, Recommendation with verdict, Pipeline Status
Clear Go / No-Go / Investigate Further verdict with rationale
Explicit 'likely in for v1' and 'likely out for v1' lists
